commands.name: ps
commands.description: Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.

commands.name: report
commands.description: reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process

options.name: --process-id
options.description: The process id to report the stack.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the process to report the stack.

commands.name: symbolicate
commands.description: Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

options.name: --search-dir
options.description: Path of multiple directories with assembly and pdb [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/xdg-config|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/nuget-packages|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/xdg-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/nuget-http-cache|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/tool|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/dotnet-home|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/xdg-data|/tmp/inspectra-help-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-f57c17cd230e4dada467392f62fdc023/xdg-runtime]

arguments.name: INPUT_PATH
arguments.description: Path to the stacktrace text file
